# My City Info

My City Info is a free, community-first local business directory for Indian cities.
It helps residents discover trusted businesses, services, restaurants, and local places
in their city. Business owners can submit and claim listings at no cost.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.mycityinfo.com/
- Browse all listings: https://www.mycityinfo.com/business-listing/
- Browse by category: https://www.mycityinfo.com/business-category/
- About: https://www.mycityinfo.com/about/

## Data
Listings include: business name, category, address, city, phone, description, FAQs,
tags, reviews, and opening hours. All listings are moderated before going live.

## Audience
People in India looking for local businesses and services.
Business owners who want free online visibility.

## Contact
https://www.mycityinfo.com/contact/
